name: Garry's Mod
description: Garry's Mod is a physics sandbox. There aren't any predefined aims or goals. We give you the tools and leave you to play.
requirements:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows® 10
  • Processor: 2 GHz Processor or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 1GB dedicated VRAM or better
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 10 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX® 9 compatible
  • Additional Notes: Mouse, Keyboard, Monitor
comment1:
I started playing Garry's Mod last year, and it became one of the best games I have ever played. It changed my life in a way I did not expect.

The reason I started playing it was because my dad banned me from playing Roblox because of my grades. At first, I was upset and did not know what to play. Then I downloaded Steam because I thought it might have some games that were as fun as Roblox. While looking through the store, I found Garry's Mod. I thought, "Wow, this game looks really cool!" I asked my mom if she could buy it for me, and thankfully she did.

When I first started playing, the game was a little difficult for me to understand. There were so many things to learn, and I did not know how to use all the tools. But after spending more time in the game, I started getting better and having a lot of fun. I learned how to build things, use mods, and explore different maps.

What makes Garry's Mod special is that there are almost no limits to what you can do. You can create your own adventures, build amazing things, and play with thousands of community-made addons. Every time I played, I found something new to try.

Garry's Mod changed my life because it helped me discover creativity and problem-solving. Instead of just playing a game, I was making my own fun and learning new things. Even though I started playing it because I could not play Roblox anymore, I am glad that happened because I found a game that I truly enjoy.

Overall, I would highly recommend Garry's Mod to anyone who likes creativity, freedom, and endless possibilities. It is one of the best games I have ever played, and I will never forget the memories I have made in it.  


10/10   One of the best creative game, I ever played!!
comment2: This is the only game where Dallas, the Gman, and Leon Kennedy can detonate a thermonuclear weapon inside of a 7/11
comment3: finally created my two NPC's after 127 hours of opening and closing the game.. now i know how to code and blender kind of, so that's cool. i love this game!
